title: MCP Tool Definition
description: JSON Schema for an MCP Tool definition registered in the OpenGeoBot platform. Tools are versioned, permission-gated and safety-scoped; an LLM/Agent proposal is an untrusted input that must pass schema, permission, state-machine, resource and safety validation before execution. All field names use snake_case.

tool_id.description: Stable unique identifier of the tool.

tool_name.description: Human-readable tool name used for display and invocation.

version.description: Semantic version of the tool definition.

description.description: Short summary of what the tool does.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool input accepted from the agent.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool output returned to the agent.

permission_code.description: Stable permission code required to invoke this tool. Checked against IAM, not role names.

risk_level.description: Platform risk classification driving safety enforcement depth.

idempotent.description: Whether repeated identical invocations produce the same effect.

rate_limit.description: Optional rate-limit policy for this tool.

max_calls.description: Maximum calls allowed within the window.

window_seconds.description: Length of the rate-limit window in seconds.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds before the tool is considered timed out.

cancellable.description: Whether an in-flight tool invocation can be cancelled.

audit_level.description: Level of audit detail recorded for invocations of this tool.
